final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 16'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
